mechanics.raw_text:
Adventure Section PARANOIA 
Wi Somebody's Got to Take the 
Fall 
Grund-G, an HPD & MC guard unit non: com with valuable contacts in the Armed Forces, was picked to head the mission. Because af his dubious political reliability, it was decided that Grund-G be kept in the dark about the real objectives of the mission; in- stead, he was told that this is jus alittle survey mission to update files on the region; if the 
paary can also figure out what happened tothe. missing mission group and salvage their equip- ‘ment, all the better. ‘Grund, a veteran Troubleshooter and sur vivor of numerous inter-service power plays, suspects that all is not kosher with the mis- sion; he has a few surprises of his own up his, sleeve, 
Adventure Summary 
I Episode One: The Briefing The Troubleshooters, eagerly looking for- ward to serving ther friend The Computer and, Alpha Complex, attempt to discover the loca tion of their briefing room, The survivors (if Any) and the clone replacements of the others meet their briefing officers, receive additional Instructions, meet Grund-G, their new team, leader, and get to ask any questions they may have about the mission. A spirited firefight, probably ensues, as loyal Troubleshooters, foast any traitors who ask for information not available at their security clearance. WW Episode Two: Outfitting at PLC 
Grund:G ushers the survivors (if any) and clone replacements off to PLC Outfitting t0 receive mission equipment, On the way, Grund-G reinforces his authority over and con- tempt for the Troubleshooters and picks a sec- ‘ond in command.
